result.stdout:
Usage: 
dotnet annotation -(h|?) - shows this help

dotnet annotation scaffold [-i assembly.dll] [-s annotation_directory]
 Scans the assembly.dll for all classes/namespaces, and generates
 scaffolding for the annotations in output_directory.

 -i assembly.dll         - REQUIRED      - name of the assembly to analyze
 -s annotation_directory - default 'out' - where to put the scaffolding

dotnet annotation generate [-s annotation_directory] [-o output_directory]
 Scans the assembly.dll for all classes/namespaces, and generates
 scaffolding for the annotations in output_directory.

 -s annotation_directory - REQUIRED      - where to read the annotations from. previously generated by scaffold
 -o output_directory     - REQUIRED      - where to put the output (html)

commands.payload:
Usage: 
dotnet annotation -(h|?) - shows this help

dotnet annotation scaffold [-i assembly.dll] [-s annotation_directory]
 Scans the assembly.dll for all classes/namespaces, and generates
 scaffolding for the annotations in output_directory.

 -i assembly.dll         - REQUIRED      - name of the assembly to analyze
 -s annotation_directory - default 'out' - where to put the scaffolding

dotnet annotation generate [-s annotation_directory] [-o output_directory]
 Scans the assembly.dll for all classes/namespaces, and generates
 scaffolding for the annotations in output_directory.

 -s annotation_directory - REQUIRED      - where to read the annotations from. previously generated by scaffold
 -o output_directory     - REQUIRED      - where to put the output (html)
